app_tagline: Aura brightens your day with commitment
auth_validation_password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
onboarding_description: Customize your Aura experience by selecting your preferences
error_network: Network error. Please check your connection
offline_mode: You're offline. Data will sync when you're back online.
logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
login_required_desc: Please login to access your profile
battery_optimization_message: For prayer alarms to work reliably, please disable battery optimization for this app.
exact_alarm_message: For prayer alarms to work correctly, please grant exact alarm permission.
background_service_subtitle: Keeps app running in background for prayer alerts
background_service_enable_subtitle: Shows persistent notification to keep app alive
auto_silent_mode_subtitle: Enable silent mode at Azan for 20 minutes
remind_me_again_desc: Send another reminder 5 minutes before prayer
check_notification_status_desc: Show notification debug info in console
location_permission_desc: Required to calculate accurate prayer times
dnd_permission_desc: Required for silent mode during prayer
focus_mode_subtitle: Lock screen and silence notifications while working on this task
focus_mode_confirm_message: This will lock your phone and silence all notifications for %d minutes. You can exit by pressing volume up 3 times quickly.
focus_mode_complete_desc: Great job! You stayed focused for %d minutes.
focus_mode_permission_message: Focus Mode requires permission to draw over other apps and access Do Not Disturb. Please grant these permissions to continue.
focus_mode_exit_hint: Press volume up 3 times to exit
accessibility_permission_desc: Required for Focus Mode to work properly
jumua_subtitle: May Allah bless your Friday and accept your prayers
overlay_permission_desc: Required to show the Focus Mode screen over other apps
untracked_prayers_subtitle: How did you perform these prayers?
bookmark_delete_message: This bookmark will be permanently removed.
wird_setup_subtitle: Commit to reading Quran every day
wird_reminder_subtitle: Get daily reminders to read your Wird
wird_how_many_pages: How many pages did you read?
wird_notif_body: Read your daily Wird — %d pages today
wird_bookmark_no_new_juz: No new juz to mark from bookmarks
wird_bookmark_mode_desc: How would you like to use this color?
info_tip_daily_content_body: A daily Quran verse, Hadith, or Dua to inspire your day. Tap the card to read more.
info_tip_prayer_progress_body: Track your five daily prayers here. Tap a circle to mark it as On Time, Late, or Missed.
info_tip_task_progress_body: See how many of today's tasks you've completed at a glance.
info_tip_today_tasks_body: A preview of your pending tasks for today. Tap to go to the full Tasks screen.
info_tip_prayer_cards_body: Mark each prayer as On Time, Late, or Missed after the 20-minute adhan window. Tap the status badge to change it.
info_tip_muslim_toolkit_body: Quick access to Qibla compass, Dhikr counter, and your Prayer Report.
banner_home_body: Your daily dashboard: track prayers, read Quran, and complete tasks — all in one place.
banner_prayer_body: View accurate prayer times, track each prayer, and access Qibla direction and Azkar.
banner_quran_body: Browse by Surah or Juz, bookmark ayahs, and set a daily Wird reading goal.
banner_tasks_body: Create, organize, and track tasks with priorities, categories, and focus mode.
tutorial_welcome_body: Your all-in-one app for prayer tracking, Quran reading, and task management. Let's take a quick tour!
tutorial_daily_content_body: A new Quran verse, Hadith, or Dua every day to inspire you. Tap the card to read more.
tutorial_next_prayer_body: Shows your upcoming prayer with a live countdown. Tap the card to go to the full Prayer Times screen.
tutorial_prayer_progress_body: Five circles for the five daily prayers. Tap any circle to mark it as On Time, Late, or Missed.
tutorial_task_progress_body: See your daily task completion at a glance. The ring fills up as you complete tasks.
tutorial_today_tasks_body: A quick preview of your pending tasks. Tap 'See All' to open the full Tasks screen.
tutorial_prayer_cards_body: Tap any prayer card to mark it as On Time, Late, or Missed. The badge updates across the app.
tutorial_muslim_toolkit_body: Quick access to Qibla compass, Dhikr counter, and your full Prayer Report.
tutorial_quran_tabs_body: Four tabs: browse by Surah or Juz, save Ayah bookmarks, and track your daily Wird reading goal.
tutorial_tasks_list_body: Tasks grouped by Overdue, Today, and Upcoming. Tap to open, long-press to reorder.
tutorial_tasks_add_body: Tap for a quick task entry, or long-press to open the full form with priority, category, due date, and focus mode.
tutorial_nav_body: Switch between Home, Prayer Times, Quran, Tasks, and Profile using this bar.
tutorial_juz_body: The Quran has 30 Juz. Tap any Juz to open it in the reader, or long-press to jump to a specific page.
tutorial_bookmarks_body: Ayahs you bookmark appear here, color-coded by your chosen label. Tap to open, swipe right or tap the trash icon to remove.
tutorial_wird_body: Set your daily reading goal in pages or Juz. Track your streak, record today's progress, and link bookmarks to auto-update your Wird.
tutorial_wird_streak_body: Your streak counts consecutive days you completed your Wird goal. Miss a day and it resets to zero — stay consistent!
tutorial_wird_progress_body: The ring shows how many pages you have read today out of your daily goal. Use the buttons below to record your reading or mark the day complete.
tutorial_wird_juz_progress_body: The ring tracks how many of the 30 Juz you have completed in total (across all time, not just today). Completing all 30 unlocks the Khatm achievement.
tutorial_wird_actions_body:
• Start / Continue Reading — opens the Quran at your current Wird page.
• Record Pages — log exactly how many pages you read.
• Mark Complete — marks today's goal done without counting exact pages.
• Add from Bookmarks — counts pages you already bookmarked in the reader.
tutorial_wird_juz_actions_body:
• Mark Complete — marks your daily juz goal as done.
• Add from Bookmarks — links a bookmark color and auto-marks all juz up to the bookmarked page.
tutorial_wird_juz_grid_body: Each cell represents one of the 30 Juz. Tap a cell to toggle it between done and not done. Completed juz are highlighted and count toward your Khatm progress.
tutorial_wird_settings_body:
• Tracking Mode: switch between Pages and Juz to match how you read.
• Daily Goal: set how many pages or juz you aim to finish each day.
• Reminders: schedule daily notifications so you never miss your Wird.
tutorial_reader_topbar_body: Tap the bookmark icon to save this page. Tap any Ayah on the page to see its text and bookmark it with a color. Tap anywhere else to hide these bars.
tutorial_reader_bottombar_body: Use the arrows to go to the previous or next page. Tap the page number to jump directly to any page in the Mushaf.
